# Path regexes excluded from ghosttype's egress-BLOCKED self secret-scan.
#
# Under egress-policy: block the test job's self-scan runs --no-verification
# (TruffleHog's live verifier needs egress to ~750 provider hosts; that is
# incompatible with a blocked runner and unnecessary here — the repo's only
# credential-shaped strings are intentional test/catalog fakes). So the scan
# is detection-only and MUST skip the files that embed credential SHAPES by
# design. What remains (the shipped package logic) must be credential-free;
# a real secret committed there still fails the build (verified locally).
#
# End-user runtime verification is unaffected — this only governs CI's own
# self-scan. One regex per line, matched against the file path.
patterns\.py
__pycache__
